SELECT
  (
    (
      SELECT AVG(Consumption)
      FROM "yearmonth"
      WHERE
        STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2013'
        AND CustomerID IN (
          SELECT
            CustomerID
          FROM "yearmonth"
          GROUP BY
            CustomerID
          ORDER BY
            Consumption
          LIMIT 1
        )
        AND Currency = 'CZK'
        AND Segment = 'SME'
    ) - (
      SELECT AVG(Consumption)

        STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2013'
        AND CustomerID IN (
          SELECT

          GROUP BY

          ORDER BY
            Consumption
          LIMIT 1
        )
        AND Currency = 'CZK'

      WHERE
        STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2013'
        AND CustomerID IN (
          SELECT
            CustomerID
          FROM "yearmonth"
          GROUP BY
            CustomerID
          ORDER BY

        )

1482:
SELECT
  T1.Segment
FROM customers AS T1
INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2
  ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE
  SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' OR SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND T2.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY
  T1.Segment
ORDER BY
  (
    (
      SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
    ) / SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
  ) DESC
LIMIT 3;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
